hearty.name: Hearty
hearty.description: Gives +10 HEALTH & heals the player by 35 HP but -2 SPEED

flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
flamethrower.description: Changes BULLET TYPE to Flames. DAMAGE is only slightly modified by upgrades, Stack for stronger Flame and reach

plasma_rounds.name: Plasma Rounds
plasma_rounds.description: Changes BULLET TYPE to Plasma. Pierces enemies and has slight AOE, Stack for greater area

normalcy.name: Normalcy
normalcy.description: Reverts BULLET TYPE to Normal & Bullets become normal size, non-explosive, non-ricocheting, and non-homing, Retains other modifiers

sulfuric_ammo.name: Sulfuric Ammo
sulfuric_ammo.description: +0.25 EXPLOSIVENESS but -5 HEALTH, Only works with Normal BULLET TYPE

cailber_increase.name: Cailber Increase
cailber_increase.description: Makes your bullet bigger but +1 MIN-FIRERATE (Slower) and -2 BULLET SPEED, and -2 BULLET AMOUNT for every upgrade, Affects EXPLOSIVENESS, Only works with Normal BULLET TYPE

flashtime.name: Flashtime
flashtime.description: Slows the world down, Stack for +0.5 FLASHTIME POWER & +3 FLASHTIME DURATION

detonation.name: Detonation
detonation.description: You can explode but -50 HEALTH, Stack for +0.5 DETONATION POWER & -4 DETONATION COOLDOWN (Faster)

dash.name: Dash
dash.description: You can dash and damage any enemies in your path. DAMAGE modifiers affect Dash, Stack for faster & stonger dash

ricochet.name: Ricochet
ricochet.description: Your bullets can ricochet from enemy to enemy and gets faster each time but you can only have 1 BULLET AMOUNT, Only works with Normal BULLET TYPE
